pages.title: CODAS-HEP Overview

pages.text: Under construction... Large scientific projects such as those in High Energy Physics are critically dependent on software and computing. The first school on Computational and Data Science for High Energy Physics will take place 10-13 July, 2017, at Princeton University. Topics to be covered at the school include: Parallel Programming Big Data Tools and Techniques Machine Learning Performance evaluation
